text: "We've got a situation," Hezekiah Bean murmured, gesturing towards a dimly lit corner of the vast room. Julian Ross's instincts kicked in, years of problem-solving experience coming to the fore as Julian Ross followed Hezekiah Bean through the labyrinth of workstations. Hezekiah Bean and Julian Ross arrived at a cluster of abandoned computers, screens flickering with indecipherable code.
context: Julian Ross is participating in a hackathon when Hezekiah Bean alerts him to a security issue.
